description: Unknown/absent regime label (None): apply_regime_exit_adjustment must return base_ticks unchanged. Safe default: no adjustment when the regime is unknown or absent.

derivation.spec_basis: PHASE3_DECISIONS.md §Regime->response mapping: 'regime absent/unknown/stale -> current behavior (no adjustment).' Hard constraint 4 from the team brief. When the regime cache has no label (first run, stale data, DB absent), the exit logic must behave exactly as before: EXIT_CONFIRM_TICKS unchanged.
derivation.tolerance_note: Expected value is exactly base_ticks=3. Exact integer equality.

expected.comment: None input must return base_ticks unchanged. This is the safe default / fail-safe path.
